texto: The type of journalism that relies on the reporter's notion of what does or doesn't "seem" correct or controversial is self-indulgent and irresponsible. It gives credence to the belief that we can intuit our way through all the various decisions we need to make in our lives and it validates the notion that our feelings are a more reliable barometer of reality than the facts.
explicacao: Citação de Seth Mnookin sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The type of journalism that relies on the reporter's notion of what does or doesn't "seem" correc…” articula autoestima, journalism, media em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como media e myths.
